ddls:
CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the class */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor assigned to the class */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the room where the class is held */,
  "max_enrollment" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the class */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the class */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the class */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites required for the class */,
  "syllabus_url" TEXT /* URL to the class syllabus */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the class (e.g., Open, Closed, Canceled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class to which the session belongs */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "session_time" TEXT /* Time of the session */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week the session is held (e.g., W, Th) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session (e.g., 1.5 hours) */,
  "attendance_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if attendance is required for the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., Lecture, Lab, Discussion) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the department's website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the instructor's office */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building where the room is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the room (number of students it can hold) */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* Equipment available in the room (e.g., projector, whiteboard) */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Information about the room's accessibility (e.g., wheelchair accessible) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the room was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the room's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of study (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Enrollment status (e.g., Waitlist, Enrolled, Confirmed) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the class */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student in the class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., Present, Absent, Late) */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the attendance (e.g., reason for absence) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attendance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attendance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., Projector, Whiteboard) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource available */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status (e.g., Available, Unavailable) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_resources" (
  "class_resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class-resource relationship */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource required */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_resources_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_resources_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_resources" (
  "session_resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session-resource relationship */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource required */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_resources_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_resources_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_sessions" (
  "class_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class-session relationship */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_sessions_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_sessions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_enrollments" (
  "class_enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class-enrollment relationship */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the enrollment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_enrollments_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_enrollments_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)
